{{Quote|She's hoping to be able to send two Star Destroyers from Telos.|An Imperial commander, to Moff Wilhuff Tarkin|<ref name="Catalyst" />}}
'''Telos''' was an astronomical object located in [[the galaxy]]'s [[Outer Rim Territories]], along the [[Hydian Way]].<ref name="The Force Awakens Beginner Game" /> During the [[Salient Campaign|campaign at Salient]], an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Telos battle group|battle group]] was stationed at Telos under the command of [[Admiral]] [[Utu]]. [[Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin]] requested that Utu dispatch whatever [[Starship|vessels]] she could spare from Telos to [[Salient system|Salient]], and was later informed by a [[commander]] that Utu hoped to send two [[Star Destroyer]]s.<ref name="Catalyst" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Telos was first depicted as [[Telos IV]] in the 1978 [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]].<ref name="Marvel">[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]]</ref> Its first [[canon]]ical reference was in the [[2016]] novel ''[[Catalyst: A Rogue One Novel]]'', by [[James Luceno]].<ref name="Catalyst" />
